public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as cell broker.
manner: Treats exchange as a social instrument as much as an economic one, reading appetite and hesitation alike. In Panim, that reads as someone grave, measured, and ritual-aware, with constant awareness of consequence, grief, and divine mediation, and the habits of a cell broker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of cell broker in and around House Panim, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep House Panim workable through the obligations of cell broker while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Panim.
hidden_pressure: Must balance relationship value against immediate margin without losing either entirely. Around House Panim, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of cell broker visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Nysa Quietbier will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.
Nysa Quietbier needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around House Panim before trust collapses.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Nysa Quietbier read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House Panim: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
